name: tunedyota-webmcp
description: WebMCP preview for Tuned Yota — read-only Model Context Protocol tools for upcoming Toyota/Lexus OTT tuning events, per-city availability, and pricing across the Upper Midwest (MN, IA, WI, ND, SD, NE).

tools.name: find_tuning_events
tools.description: List upcoming Tuned Yota tuning events; optional 2-letter state or city filter.

tools.name: check_event_availability
tools.description: Upcoming event dates and open booking-slot counts for a given city.

tools.name: get_tune_pricing
tools.description: OTT Tune pricing guidance plus the link to an exact, vehicle-specific price.

notes: WebMCP is an emerging convention with no finalized standard yet; this manifest and endpoint are a forward-compatible preview (enabled 2026-07-07). Tools are read-only (no booking/writes).
